---
title: "exploratory_analysis"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-21"
---

```{r}
library(readr)
data <- read_csv("emergency_response_data.csv")
View(emergency_response_data)

```

```{r}
### DATA CLEANING ###


unique(data$`Call Type`) 
##mb lets delete the cols with call types that we are not necesarily interested? 
# like gaf marine fires lowk
# or strange odors...

## We can also delete address since we have already lat and long info

```

```{r}

### Questions to Answer ###

# WHich call type group has the quickest response time?



```
